english translation text: karbala walon ki zindaan se rehaai ho gayiThe women & children of Karbala have been released from prisonEnglish Transliteration

urdu transliteration text:
karbala walon ki zindaan se rehaai ho gayiturbat-e-baali sakina se judaai ho gayi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The women & children of Karbala have been released from prison,
They are bidding farewell to the grave of Sakina

urdu transliteration text:
is kadar maare tamache hai shimr-e-badkaar nehashr tak wo mout baba ki rulaayi so gayiturbat-e-baali sakina se judaai hogayi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
The evil Shimr has slapped Sakina so many times, that she will keep crying till the Day of Judgement,
They are bidding farewell to the grave of Sakina

urdu transliteration text:
momino moo ko chupalo noch daalo sar ke baalsar barehna dasht may zahara ki jayee ho gayiturbat-e-baali sakina se judaai ho gayi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
Oh believers, mourn & lament, for the daughter of Zahra is without her veil in the desert of Karbala
They are bidding farewell to the grave of Sakina

urdu transliteration text:
asghar-e-masoom ka wo muskarana maut pardekh kar sharminda darya ki tarayi ho gayiturbat-e-baali sakina se judaai ho gayi
@HujjatELC
english translation text: When the river saw the smile of Asghar as he was dying in his father’s arms, it was ashamed of itself as it could not offer water to him

urdu transliteration text:
sar kata gulzaar jab mushkil kusha ke laal kata qayamat deen ki mushkil kushayi ho gayiturbat-e-baali sakina se judaai hogayi
@HujjatELC
english translation text:
When the beloved son of Mushkil Kusha (Imam Ali) was beheaded,
The religion of Islam was saved till the Day of Judgement
